assertions.query: CREATE TABLE test2 (pk BIGINT PRIMARY KEY, v1 BIGINT);
SELECT * FROM test ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1;
INSERT INTO test (pk, v2) SELECT pk + 5, v2 + 10 FROM test WHERE v2 IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test SET v1 = pk + v2;
UPDATE test SET pk = subquery.val FROM (SELECT 22 as val) AS subquery WHERE pk >= 7;
DELETE FROM test WHERE v1 = pk;
SELECT from_pk, to_pk, from_v1, to_v1 FROM dolt_diff_test;
SELECT ARRAY[v1]::boolean[] FROM test1 ORDER BY id;
SELECT ARRAY[v1] FROM test1 ORDER BY id;
SELECT ARRAY[v1, true, v1] FROM test1 ORDER BY id;

expectedRows.value: {{1001 -2 false finite true},{2002 -2 false finite true},{3003 -2 false finite true}}

assertions.query: SELECT * FROM test WHERE v1 BETWEEN 1 AND 4 ORDER BY v1;
SELECT * FROM test WHERE v1 BETWEEN 2 AND 4 ORDER BY v1;
SELECT * FROM test WHERE v1 BETWEEN 4 AND 2 ORDER BY v1;
SELECT * FROM test WHERE v1 BETWEEN SYMMETRIC 1 AND 4 ORDER BY v1;
SELECT * FROM test WHERE v1 BETWEEN SYMMETRIC 2 AND 4 ORDER BY v1;
SELECT * FROM test WHERE v1 BETWEEN SYMMETRIC 4 AND 2 ORDER BY v1;
SELECT * FROM test WHERE v1 NOT BETWEEN 1 AND 4 ORDER BY v1;
SELECT * FROM test WHERE v1 NOT BETWEEN 2 AND 4 ORDER BY v1;
SELECT * FROM test WHERE v1 NOT BETWEEN 4 AND 2 ORDER BY v1;
SELECT * FROM test WHERE v1 NOT BETWEEN SYMMETRIC 1 AND 4 ORDER BY v1;
SELECT * FROM test WHERE v1 NOT BETWEEN SYMMETRIC 2 AND 4 ORDER BY v1;
SELECT * FROM test WHERE v1 NOT BETWEEN SYMMETRIC 4 AND 2 ORDER BY v1;
SELECT * FROM test WHERE v1 IN (2, '3', 4) ORDER BY v1;
SELECT * FROM test WHERE v2 IN (2, '3', 4) ORDER BY v1;
SELECT SUM(v1) FROM test WHERE v1 BETWEEN 3 AND 5;
SELECT pg_typeof(SUM(v1)) FROM test WHERE v1 BETWEEN 3 AND 5;
SELECT SUM(v1) FROM test WHERE v1 BETWEEN 3 AND 5;
